# Supply Chain — Prompts

Prompt collection for **Supply Chain**.

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |
| ----- | --- | -------- | ---------- |
| [Carrier Performance Research](../../_canonical/carrier-performance-research.md) | Cross-App | Gather carrier feedback from communications for performance review. | intermediate |
| [Contract Negotiation Research](../../_canonical/contract-negotiation-research.md) | Cross-App | Research contract context from discussions. Legal review required for terms. | intermediate |
| [Customer Delivery Communication](../../_canonical/customer-delivery-communication.md) | Outlook | Draft customer delivery updates for review and verification. | intermediate |
| [Customs Issue Research](../../_canonical/customs-issue-research.md) | Cross-App | Find precedents for customs issues to inform resolution. | intermediate |
| [Demand Signal Summary](../../_canonical/demand-signal-summary.md) | Cross-App | Gather qualitative demand signals from communications for planning input. | intermediate |
| [Disruption Response Summary](../../_canonical/disruption-response-summary.md) | Cross-App | Document disruption response from communications for review and lessons learned. | intermediate |
| [Excess Inventory Discussion](../../_canonical/excess-inventory-discussion.md) | Cross-App | Research excess inventory discussions for optimization planning. | intermediate |
| [Inventory Pattern Analysis](../../_canonical/inventory-pattern-analysis.md) | Cross-App | Identify inventory planning themes from discussions. Use analytics for metrics. | intermediate |
| [Product Launch Planning](../../_canonical/product-launch-planning.md) | Cross-App | Gather product launch context for inventory planning. | intermediate |
| [S&OP Meeting Preparation](../../_canonical/sop-meeting-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for S&OP meetings with context from cross-functional discussions. | intermediate |
| [Shipment Issue Summary](../../_canonical/shipment-issue-summary.md) | Cross-App | Compile shipment issue context from communications. TMS is source of tracking data. | intermediate |
| [Stock Issue Research](../../_canonical/stock-issue-research.md) | Cross-App | Research stock issue history from communications. | intermediate |
| [Supplier Performance Summary](../../_canonical/supplier-performance-summary.md) | Cross-App | Gather qualitative supplier context from communications. Use SCM system for metrics. | intermediate |
| [Supply Chain Risk Assessment](../../_canonical/supply-chain-risk-assessment.md) | Cross-App | Gather supply chain risk discussions for formal risk assessment. | intermediate |
| [Weekly Operations Summary](../../_canonical/weekly-operations-summary.md) | Cross-App | Create weekly logistics summary from communications. | intermediate |
